mentions.note: Owner of Kay, Zales, Jared. Elevated gold and silver prices may pressure margins; stock at 9x earnings may price in commodity upside already. High precious metals prices hurt jewelry retailer profitability.

Operational turnaround under CEO JK Symancyk: simplified to 4 core brands (Zales, Jared), strong cash flow ($525M, +20% YoY), digital/store experience investments. Lab-grown diamonds +20% penetration. Stock +58% past 12 months, transitioning to quality retailer story.
Reports Tuesday; 'excellent barometer of consumer times' per Cramer; discretionary sales indicate broader consumer health.
Blowout quarter ($0.18 EPS beat, $600M FCF, 30% EPS growth); 'Grow Brand Love' strategy clarifying brand differentiation; consistency emerging.
